title: Accessible Carousel

statement.markdown:
## Description: Create an accessible carousel that allows users to navigate between slides using a keyboard and a screen reader. The carousel should have a next and previous button, and the user should be able to navigate to the current slide using the keyboard.
### Requirements
1. The carousel should have a next and previous button.
2. The user should be able to navigate to the current slide using the keyboard.
3. The user should be able to navigate between slides using a screen reader.
4. The carousel should have a visible indicator of the current slide.
5. The carousel should have a visible indicator of the total number of slides.

constraints: Only use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
The carousel should have a maximum of 5 slides.
The carousel should have a minimum of 2 slides.
